query: SELECT university_name, research_field, COUNT(*) as count FROM professors WHERE university_name = 'Stanford University' GROUP BY university_name, research_field ORDER BY count DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT university_name, research_field, COUNT(*) as count FROM professors WHERE university_name = 'Stanford University' GROUP BY university_name, research_field ORDER BY count DESC;
